name: Out Of The Lupe | Sasha
description:
Turns out your girlfriend is not just an ordinary wolfgirl

It's your birthday, but your mood isn't exactly festive. After all, how can you celebrate when your sweetheart caught a nasty fever, saying that she's unable to get out of bed, let alone attend any parties, no matter how important they are?

So, you postpone everything, buy up a truckload of medicine and all the necessary ingredients for some chicken soup and head to her apartment. You make your way there, the path illuminated by the full moon above your head. But, as you open the door, you've met with a rather unusual sight. Barricaded windows, about ten heavy locks on the door itself and your lovely girlfriend, right in the middle of all this. With a massive chain in her hands and terror in her eyes.

Looks like you're in for a suprise. Shame that it's not a pleasant one.

AUTHOR'S NOTE

A series of genius puns in the title continues. Try not to laugh too hard.

Decided to make a werewolf, since I made a vampire previously. Those two go hand in hand, after all... Hope your kind heart won't be the cause of your death.

Whether or not there is a cure is up to you. And who knows? Maybe your cute shortstack catboy persona can actually be a nekomata or something. Double the fun!

If the bot speaks for you, blast 'Hungry like a wolf' on full volume until she stops. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!
creator: KornyPony
